name: Station Dots
author: nzh0172
description:
Change station dot marker appearance in map if you're annoyed of clicking small circles.

Appearance

  • Size & Scale: Station group dots, normal station dots, route icon, station name text
  • Scale: Edit route button on station (+)
  • Color: Station group dots
  • Shapes: Station group dots, normal station dots
  • Outline color & thickness: Station group dots, normal station dots
  • Wrap width: Route icon
  • Visibility: Route icon, station name text
  • Style: Station group dots

Features

  • Sort route icon by text/number in ascending or descending order
  • Group route icon by shapes
  • Join distinct station names in a station group with '/' and flip them
  • Quick copy emoji presets: Flight, Bus, Ferry, Metro, Bus, Cable
  • Add route codes (with station numbering) for station group dots

Style
